content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to resolve a longstanding flaw of curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods (ICM, RND): the stagnation of intrinsic reward in over-explored, familiar environments. By routing low-novelty experienced states to a compressed long-term memory store and only allocating high-resolution episodic memory storage to states that fall just outside the agent's current predictive confidence, this hybrid design maintains a sustained intrinsic motivation signal that avoids both premature convergence and infinite looping on trivial high-variance distractors.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
